message:
test(proptest): add 12 property tests for byte compression coverage gaps

byte_compression: 11→23 tests (CompressionLevel/Config/Stats/Error serde roundtrips, cross-level decompression compatibility, size prefix length encoding, batch stats input_bytes, garbage decompression safety, has_dictionary state, Stats ratio calculation, zero output ratio, default level)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
